recommendations.title: Goin' South
recommendations.overview: Henry Moon is captured for a capital offense by a posse when his horse quits while trying to escape to Mexico. He finds that there is a post-Civil War law in the small town that any single or widowed woman can save him from the gallows by marrying hi

recommendations.title: Chinatown
recommendations.overview: Private eye Jake Gittes lives off of the murky moral climate of sunbaked, pre-World War II Southern California. Hired by a beautiful socialite to investigate her husband's extra-marital affair, Gittes is swept into a maelstrom of double dealings and

recommendations.title: The Blue Dahlia
recommendations.overview: Soon after a veteran returns from war, his cheating wife is found dead. He evades police in an attempt to find the real murderer.

recommendations.title: The Bigamist
recommendations.overview: San Francisco businessman Harry Graham and his wife and business partner, Eve, are in the process of adopting a child. When private investigator Mr. Jordan uncovers the fact that Graham has another wife, Phyllis, and a small child in Los Angeles, he

recommendations.title: Murder, My Sweet
recommendations.overview: After being hired to find an ex-con's former girlfriend, Philip Marlowe is drawn into a deeply complex web of mystery and deceit.

recommendations.title: A Walk Among the Tombstones
recommendations.overview: Private investigator Matthew Scudder is hired by a drug kingpin to find out who kidnapped and murdered his wife.

recommendations.title: The Raven
recommendations.overview: A magician who has been turned into a raven turns to a former sorcerer for help.

recommendations.title: The Last Detail
recommendations.overview: Two Navy men are ordered to bring a young offender to prison, but decide to show him one last good time along the way.

recommendations.title: Reptile
recommendations.overview: Following the brutal murder of a young real estate agent, a hardened detective attempts to uncover the truth in a case where nothing is as it seems, and by doing so dismantles the illusions in his own life.

recommendations.title: The Big Sleep
recommendations.overview: Private Investigator Philip Marlowe is hired by wealthy General Sternwood regarding a matter involving his youngest daughter Carmen. Before the complex case is over, Marlowe sees murder, blackmail, deception, and what might be love.
